source_plan.query: Prove the properties of a skew symmetric matrix

item_refs.text: Proof
Let A be a square matrix, then we can write
Proof

Definition 5 A square matrix A = [ a ij ] is said to be skew symmetric matrix if A โฒ = โ A, that is a ji = โ a ij for all possible values of i and j . Now, if we put i = j , we have a ii = โ a ii . Therefore 2 a ii = 0 or a ii = 0 for all i โs.
This means that all the diagonal elements of a skew symmetric matrix are zero.

item_refs.text: B โฒ = (A + A โฒ ) โฒ
= A โฒ + (A โฒ ) โฒ (as (A + B) โฒ = A โฒ + B โฒ )
= A โฒ + A (as (A โฒ ) โฒ = A)
= A + A โฒ (as A + B = B + A)
= B
Therefore B = A + A โฒ is a symmetric matrix
Now let C = A โ A โฒ
C โฒ = (A โ A โฒ ) โฒ = A โฒ โ (A โฒ ) โฒ (Why?)
= A โฒ โ A (Why?)
= โ (A โ A โฒ ) = โ C
Therefore C = A โ A โฒ is a skew symmetric matrix.
Theorem 2 Any square matrix can be expressed as the sum of a symmetric and a skew symmetric matrix.

Example 24 If A and B are symmetric matrices of the same order, then show that AB is symmetric if and only if A and B commute, that is AB = BA.
Solution Since A and B are both symmetric matrices, therefore A โฒ = A and B โฒ = B.
Reprint 2026-27
MATRICES 71
Let AB be symmetric, then (AB) โฒ = AB But (AB) โฒ = B โฒ A โฒ = BA (Why?) Therefore BA = AB Conversely, if AB = BA, then we shall show that AB is symmetric. Now (AB) โฒ = B โฒ A โฒ
= BA (as A and B are symmetric) = AB Hence AB is symmetric.

ยฎ A matrix is an ordered rectangular array of numbers or functions. ยฎ A matrix having m rows and n columns is called a matrix of order m ร n . ยฎ [ a ij ] m ร 1 is a column matrix. ยฎ [ a ij ] 1 ร n is a row matrix. ยฎ An m ร n matrix is a square matrix if m = n . ยฎ A = [ a ij ] m ร m is a diagonal matrix if a ij = 0, when i โ  j . ยฎ A = [ a ij ] n ร n is a scalar matrix if a ij = 0, when i โ  j , a ij = k , ( k is some

constant), when i = j . ยฎ A = [ a ij ] n ร n is an identity matrix, if a ij = 1, when i = j , a ij = 0, when i โ  j . ยฎ A zero matrix has all its elements as zero. ยฎ A = [ a ij ] = [ b ij ] = B if (i) A and B are of same order, (ii) a ij = b ij for all
possible values of i and j .
